features: Shortest hiring process: 2 weeks to informal offer

company_recognitions.description: Recognition for comprehensive health management initiatives
Certification for excellent health management practices
Registration as a company working toward SDGs

notes: Company founded May 20, 1978 (Showa 53) and incorporated October 22, 1991 (Heisei 3)
Company philosophy based on 'Three Loves' (三つの愛): customers, business partners, and employees
Specializes in core business systems, embedded systems (automotive), and third-party verification
Maintains low public profile with focus on B2B services
Strong emphasis on employee health, wellbeing, and work-life balance
